description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_NAME variable set to registry.gitlab.com/deepset-ai/open-source/glove-embeddings-de. Add a before_script that runs `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`. Define a single stage called build and a job named "build docker" that runs only on the master branch, executes `docker build -t $IMAGE_NAME .` followed by `docker push $IMAGE_NAME`, and is assigned to the build stage. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified.
